description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On July 20, 2025 at 12:00 AM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle ("Waymo AV") operating in San Francisco, California was in a collision 
involving an SUV in a parking lot at 584 Brannan Street.  
 
The Waymo AV was parked in a parking stall facing southeast in a parking lot at 584 Brannan Street. An SUV parked directly in front of 
the Waymo AV reversed and the rear of the SUV made contact with the front of the Waymo AV.  At the time of the impact, the Waymo 
AV's Level 4 ADS was engaged in autonomous mode. The SUV sustained damage.
Print
Clear Form
